Case Studies

Real-world results from SAM4 deployments across industries.

52 results

Industry
All Aviation Chemicals Food & beverage Manufacturing Mining & metals Oil & gas Steel Tank storage Water
Application
All Anolyte pump Belt-driven equipment Blower Booster pump Borehole pump Centrifugal pump Circulator pump Conveyor Cooling pump Fan Godet roll Pump Roller conveyor Rotor Screw pump Sewage pump Shot blaster Submersible pump Transfer pump
Failure mode
All Bearing damage Belt degradation Cavitation Clogging Coupling fault Electrical fault Energy inefficiency Gearbox degradation Impeller damage Mechanical wear Misalignment Motor overload Multiple Process issue

How Stansted airport uses SAM4 to monitor baggage handling equipment continuously without interrupting operations.

Sabesp gained real-time visibility into submersible pump performance, improving efficiency across thousands of assets.

How zinc smelter Nyrstar got 800% ROI in 11 months

Nyrstar moved from reactive firefighting to planned maintenance, achieving 800% ROI in under a year.

Identifying a broken sine wave filter in ESPs

SAM4 detected irregular harmonic patterns and voltage imbalance on an ESP that other systems missed.

Read more →

Southern Water: preventing 3 failures, saving £748K

SAM4 detected three potential failures across 637 monitored pumps, preventing pollution incidents.

Alert prevents pollution event, saves €100k
